title: lycopersicon esculentum var. humboldtii
intro: Lycopersicon esculentum var. humboldtii, also known as the 'Humboldt Tomato', is a variety of the cultivated tomato plant (Solanum lycopersicum). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, derived from its high content of lycopene and other carotenoids. The health benefits of Lycopersicon esculentum var. humboldtii include reducing the risk of certain cancers and heart disease, as well as supporting eye health and immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as fresh or dried leaves and fruits, can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed for their medicinal benefits.
